summary: The active branch is vault-sync-architecture. Local config bundles now export snapshot ancestry, the Settings flow previews merge impact, and same-vault imports can merge non-conflicting records or resolve conflicts by keeping local or preferring imported data before apply.
next_steps: Add deletion semantics and tombstones for vault snapshot merges instead of retaining local-only records by default.
Run .github/workflows/release-macos.yml once with live repository secrets to verify GitHub-hosted signing, notarization, promotion, and release upload.
blockers: Vault merge semantics do not yet model deletions, so local-only records are retained by default.
GitHub-hosted release publishing has not yet been exercised with live repository secrets.
